section1_notice_scroll_gate.verdict: could not exercise: 414551001 has an active 博士生獎學金 114全年 application, so the 學生申請 tab shows '目前沒有符合資格的獎學金' and the wizard never mounts NoticeAgreementStep
section1_notice_scroll_gate.remediation: use a different student account with an open eligible scholarship and no in-flight application

section2_bank_doc_delete.verdict: DELETE /api/v1/user-profiles/me/bank-document returns 200 with success:false 'no doc found' when no doc exists; profile remains consistent (bank_document_photo_url stays null). Endpoint is wired and behaves; but the upload→delete→404 round-trip cycle could not be exercised because 414551001 has no bank doc on staging and uploading a real file to staging without permission was avoided.
section2_bank_doc_delete.endpoint_path_correction: the local-dev recipe used /api/v1/users/me/bank-document; the actual staging path is /api/v1/user-profiles/me/bank-document (per generated schema.d.ts)
